name: ProphitBet-Soccer-Bets-Predictor
desc: ProphitBet is a Machine Learning Soccer Bet prediction application. It analyzes the form of teams, computes match statistics and predicts the outcomes of a mat…
descFull: ProphitBet is a Machine Learning Soccer Bet prediction application. It analyzes the form of teams, computes match statistics and predicts the outcomes of a match using Advanced Machine Learning (ML) methods. The supported algorithms in this application are Neural Networks, Random Forests & Ensembl Models.
